title: Varasia squarrosa

Further classification places Varasia squarrosa within the family Ericaceae, which contains a diverse range of plants commonly known as heath or heather plants. This classification is based on its physical characteristics and genetic makeup. The family Ericaceae is a large and widespread group of plants, found in many parts of the world.
